narrative:
Farmer Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 637 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
